# polymarket_portfolio_value (Data Source)

Reads the total current portfolio value of a Polymarket wallet, in USDC.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "polymarket_portfolio_value" "example" {
  user = "0x349606c1b77f3ba668879cbc9347f15a44cf8fc4"
}

output "portfolio_value_usdc" {
  value = data.polymarket_portfolio_value.example.value
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `user` (String) Wallet address to value (`0x`-prefixed). The only required input.

### Read-Only

- `value` (Number) Total mark-to-market value of all the wallet's positions, in USDC.
